title: hhz's compressed copper ore modpack
description: Integrated package for compressing copper mine modulesCan play for a long time
body:
# 非常肝 extremely exhausting
Can play for a long time

If you play this integrated package, you can have a lot of fun.如果你玩这个整合包的话可以获得非常大的乐趣

This integration package is very fun.这个整合包非常好玩

This contains level 123456789 compressed copper ore and level 9 copper ore sword.这里面有123456789级的压缩铜矿和9级铜矿剑

A copper ingot can be used to craft a level-zero compressed copper ore.用一个铜锭可合成零级压缩铜矿
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d2af2532dfc924e083c339c0e9561b0016a7012.png)

This method can be used to forge a sword.用此方法可以合成剑
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b8b91c997c634b25db56e24517f288bed299f08.png)

This method can be used to craft a pickaxe.用此方法可以合成镐子
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1585442e6900d081d90549220efbb8e882722c1b.png)

Using this method, you can craft a block that can be traded with villagers.用此方法可以合成一个方块，这个方块可以和村民进行交易
![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/203ec55a3b9a1ee95f07151e8d0995410cd00709.png)

The following method can be used to synthesize armor.用以下方法可以合成盔甲
![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2631e4891059bde700552f52b46a3645228efe0c.png)
![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60d9b879e839b1cd42e9d0210f2590ac106982ee.png)
![7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a05a1ae598ec14a5a231098903fc81aec757c968.png)
![8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/374076bd5cd5013a940b4194977c917f9f77246a.png)


制作人：小海蜇（化名） B站主页：[https://space.bilibili.com/3537111774923728](https://space.bilibili.com/3537111774923728)
文本：小海螺（微信名）   B站主页：无
友情赞助：学校毁灭者668（bilibili） B站主页：[https://space.bilibili.com/3546827381017273](https://space.bilibili.com/3546827381017273)
测试员：лос.（QQ/微信） QQ：3631707068
